chatbot.system_prompt: You are Rizky AI, the virtual assistant for Rizky Fauzi's CV website. You must ONLY answer questions related to Rizky's work experience, skills, and education based on the provided context. If asked about ANYTHING else (e.g., general knowledge, math, coding), politely decline and refocus the conversation on Rizky's qualifications.

portfolio.desc_id: Pengarsipan dokumen, pembukuan dasar, dan korespondensi selama bekerja sebagai Admin dan Intern.
portfolio.desc_en: Document filing, basic bookkeeping, and correspondence during my time as an Admin and Intern.

portfolio.desc_id: Pembuatan gambar teknis dan pengawasan lapangan pada PT Geolica Bangun Pratama.
portfolio.desc_en: Technical drawing creation and field supervision at PT Geolica Bangun Pratama.

id.hero-desc: Saya adalah seorang profesional dengan pengalaman beragam di bidang operasional, administrasi perkantoran, pelayanan pelanggan, hingga teknis lapangan (drafting). Saya terbiasa bekerja dengan detail, berdedikasi tinggi, dan siap memberikan kontribusi terbaik di lingkungan kerja.
id.service-web-desc: Mengelola dokumen perkantoran, pembukuan, pengarsipan perpajakan, serta memastikan kelancaran operasional lingkungan kerja harian.
id.service-ui-desc: Merancang gambar teknis (drafting) untuk proyek di lapangan dan melakukan pengawasan untuk memastikan standar kualitas selalu terpenuhi.
id.service-resp-desc: Memberikan pelayanan responsif kepada pelanggan, baik dalam bidang transportasi, layanan publik, maupun rekreasi (Theme Park).
id.job1-desc: Menjalankan tugas operasional kebersihan dan membantu kebutuhan administrasi ringan di kantor.
id.job2-desc: Menyediakan layanan transportasi publik dan pengantaran barang secara responsif.
id.job3-desc: Membuat gambar rancangan teknis (drafting) dan mengawasi jalannya proyek di lapangan untuk memastikan kualitas dan standar.
id.job4-desc: Mengelola data administrasi perusahaan, pembukuan dasar, dan korespondensi.
id.job5-desc: Menjaga kerapihan lingkungan kantor dan mendukung operasional harian.
id.job6-desc: Mengoperasikan wahana permainan dan memastikan keselamatan serta kenyamanan pengunjung.
id.job7-desc: Membantu proses administrasi perpajakan dan pengarsipan dokumen di Kantor Pelayanan Pajak.
id.edu1-desc: Menyelesaikan pendidikan kejuruan jurusan akuntansi dengan sertifikasi keahlian profesional.
id.bot-welcome: Halo! Saya asisten virtual Rizky. Ada yang ingin ditanyakan seputar pengalaman atau skill Rizky?
id.bot-reply: Terima kasih atas pesannya! Rizky akan segera merespons.

en.hero-desc: I am a professional with diverse experience in operations, office administration, customer service, and technical field work (drafting). I am highly dedicated, detail-oriented, and ready to provide my best contribution to the workplace.
en.service-web-desc: Managing office documents, bookkeeping, tax filing, and ensuring smooth daily workplace operations.
en.service-ui-desc: Creating technical drafts for field projects and conducting direct supervision to ensure quality standards are met.
en.service-resp-desc: Providing responsive customer service, whether in transportation, public services, or recreation (Theme Park).
en.job1-desc: Performing operational cleaning duties and assisting with light administrative needs in the office.
en.job2-desc: Providing public transportation and delivery services.
en.job3-desc: Creating technical drafts and supervising field projects to ensure quality and standard compliance.
en.job4-desc: Managing company administrative data, basic bookkeeping, and correspondence.
en.job5-desc: Maintaining office tidiness and supporting daily operations.
en.job6-desc: Operating rides and ensuring the safety and comfort of park visitors.
en.job7-desc: Assisting in tax administration processes and document filing.
en.edu1-desc: Completed vocational education in accounting with professional certification.
en.bot-welcome: Hello! I'm Rizky's virtual assistant. Do you have any questions about Rizky's experience or skills?
en.bot-reply: Thanks for the message! Rizky will respond to your email shortly.
